text.title: Pricing Strategy Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Pricing Strategy end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: compute-cost-floor
step.action: Compute direct + amortised cost per customer / month.

step.name: research-value-ceiling
step.action: Run Van Westendorp / WTP interviews; derive ceiling.

step.name: draft-price-points
step.action: Draft tier prices within floor-ceiling band.
